deep.title: Mellum2 Technical Report
deep.one_line: 12B MoE代码生成模型，融合工具调用与agentic编程，系统设计模式可直接迁移

deep.title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
deep.one_line: 动态基准测试LLM代理在逐步约束下的自适应规划能力

deep.title: TIDE: Proactive Multi-Problem Discovery via Template-Guided Iteration
deep.one_line: 通过模板引导迭代主动发现用户上下文中的隐藏问题

radar.title: LatentSkill: From In-Context Textual Skills to In-Weight Latent Skills for LLM Agents
radar.one_line: 将文本技能转换为LoRA权重，减少上下文开销，实现模块化技能存储与组合。

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 搜索agent直接通过shell命令与语料库交互，替代传统检索器

radar.title: SWE-Explore: Benchmarking How Coding Agents Explore Repositories
radar.one_line: 隔离评估代码agent的仓库探索能力，提供可迁移测评范式

radar.title: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
radar.one_line: 可控制环境分析并检测基于规则RL中的奖励黑客行为。

radar.title: ResearchClawBench: A Benchmark for End-to-End Autonomous Scientific Research
radar.one_line: 端到端自主科研基准，提供可迁移的评测方法论。

radar.title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts
radar.one_line: 韩语网页浏览agent基准，评测方法论可迁移到AutoSci的agent评估

radar.title: Audio Interaction Model
radar.one_line: 在线感知-决策-响应循环的音频交互模型，统一流式任务

radar.title: dMoE: dLLMs with Learnable Block Experts
radar.one_line: 提出可学习块专家解决扩散LLM与MoE的不匹配，提升并行解码效率。

radar.title: Imaginative Perception Tokens Enhance Spatial Reasoning in Multimodal Language Models
radar.one_line: 引入想象感知令牌提升多模态模型空间推理，可迁移至智能体感知模块。

radar.title: Your UnEmbedding Matrix is Secretly a Feature Lens for Text Embeddings
radar.one_line: 发现UnEmbedding矩阵可作为特征透镜，指导文本嵌入改进。
